{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Satisfaction Representative",
  "description": "DSL Pharma is a manufacturing company that is currently focused on providing cutting edge veterinary and pharmaceutical solutions, customized to meet the daily needs of her end users.

We manufacture different drugs for improve livestock&rsquo;s health. Our product is specially tailored to suit the environmental sustainability of livestock&rsquo;s within Nigeria. Our animal health products undergo rigorous quality control to be certified fit for use on farm animals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Satisfaction Representative

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT), Delta, Oyo, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Customer Satisfaction Representative (CSR) is a sales-focused role responsible for driving revenue growth while ensuring excellent customer experience across assigned regions.
	The role involves managing customer relationships, promoting company products, resolving client concerns, and ensuring consistent market coverage.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of poultry vaccines, medications, and related products within assigned territory.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, farmers, and key stakeholders.
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through prompt response to inquiries, complaints, and after-sales support.
	Conduct regular field visits to customers and prospects to promote products and gather market intelligence.
	Identify new business opportunities and expand customer base.
	Monitor competitor activities and provide market feedback to management.
	Ensure timely order processing, delivery follow-up, and payment collection.
	Organise product demonstrations, training sessions, and customer engagement activities.
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities, customer interactions, and reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams (logistics, technical, and admin) to ensure seamless service delivery.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Monthly and quarterly sales targets.
	Customer retention and satisfaction levels.
	Growth in customer base within the assigned region.
	Timely collection of payments.
	Market coverage and visit frequency.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Animal Science, Veterinary Medicine, Agriculture, Business Administration, or related field.
	2-4 years of experience in sales, preferably in poultry, FMCG, or pharmaceutical industry.
	Strong understanding of poultry farming and animal health products is an advantage.
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage a territory effectively.
	Willingness to travel extensively within the assigned region.


Key Competencies:


	Customer-focused mindset.
	Strong sales and persuasion skills.
	Problem-solving and complaint resolution ability.
	Relationship management.
	Result-driven and self-motivated.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;job@dslpharma.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Customer Satisfaction Representative&rdquo;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "DSL Pharma"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Delta, Oyo, Plateau",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197619"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Customer Satisfaction Representative Job at DSL Pharma




        
    

        
        DSL Pharma is a manufacturing company that is currently focused on providing cutting edge veterinary and pharmaceutical solutions, customized to meet the daily needs of her end users.

We manufacture different drugs for improve livestock’s health. Our product is specially tailored to suit the environmental sustainability of livestock’s within Nigeria. Our animal health products undergo rigorous quality control to be certified fit for use on farm animals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Satisfaction Representative

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Delta, Oyo, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Customer Satisfaction Representative (CSR) is a sales-focused role responsible for driving revenue growth while ensuring excellent customer experience across assigned regions.
	The role involves managing customer relationships, promoting company products, resolving client concerns, and ensuring consistent market coverage.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of poultry vaccines, medications, and related products within assigned territory.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, farmers, and key stakeholders.
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through prompt response to inquiries, complaints, and after-sales support.
	Conduct regular field visits to customers and prospects to promote products and gather market intelligence.
	Identify new business opportunities and expand customer base.
	Monitor competitor activities and provide market feedback to management.
	Ensure timely order processing, delivery follow-up, and payment collection.
	Organise product demonstrations, training sessions, and customer engagement activities.
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities, customer interactions, and reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams (logistics, technical, and admin) to ensure seamless service delivery.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Monthly and quarterly sales targets.
	Customer retention and satisfaction levels.
	Growth in customer base within the assigned region.
	Timely collection of payments.
	Market coverage and visit frequency.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Animal Science, Veterinary Medicine, Agriculture, Business Administration, or related field.
	2-4 years of experience in sales, preferably in poultry, FMCG, or pharmaceutical industry.
	Strong understanding of poultry farming and animal health products is an advantage.
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage a territory effectively.
	Willingness to travel extensively within the assigned region.


Key Competencies:


	Customer-focused mindset.
	Strong sales and persuasion skills.
	Problem-solving and complaint resolution ability.
	Relationship management.
	Result-driven and self-motivated.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Customer Satisfaction Representative” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "IT Assistant",
  "description": "Laim Hotel is a 5-star luxury hotel located at Plot B4 &amp; B5, Block 11, Oroki Industrial Layout, Ring Road, Osogbo, Osun State.&nbsp;Laim Hotel Limited is situated in an ultra-serene town of Osogbo metropolis therefore affording guests the opportunity of relaxing in an atmosphere of complete comfort, serenity, maximum security, luxury and royalty.&nbsp;

Laim Hotel sports ninety-seven rooms spread over seven strategically designed floors thus providing tastefully furnished and beautifully designed home away from home rooms.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;IT Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Osogbo, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a BSc / HND qualification with at least 2 years of work experience.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;laimhoteljobs2023@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

IT Assistant Job at Laim Hotel




        
    

        
        Laim Hotel is a 5-star luxury hotel located at Plot B4 & B5, Block 11, Oroki Industrial Layout, Ring Road, Osogbo, Osun State. Laim Hotel Limited is situated in an ultra-serene town of Osogbo metropolis therefore affording guests the opportunity of relaxing in an atmosphere of complete comfort, serenity, maximum security, luxury and royalty. 

Laim Hotel sports ninety-seven rooms spread over seven strategically designed floors thus providing tastefully furnished and beautifully designed home away from home rooms.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Assistant

Job Location: Osogbo, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess a BSc / HND qualification with at least 2 years of work experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Executive Assistant Job at 7Eleven Consultancy Services




        
    

        
        7Eleven Consultancy Services is a professional Human Resources and Management consulting firm focused on delivering tailored workforce and organizational solutions. We specialize in talent acquisition, HR advisory, workforce risk and resilience management, and business support services, helping organizations build efficient structures and high-performing teams.

Working closely with clients across various industries, we provide end-to-end support in recruitment, performance management, and strategic HR interventions designed to drive growth, strengthen resilience, and enhance operational excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Executive Assistant will provide high-level administrative support while managing projects and supporting the organization’s digital presence through social media coordination.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage executive calendars, meetings, travel, and correspondence
	Support planning and execution of key projects and initiatives
	Track project timelines, deliverables, and reporting
	Develop and manage social media content and posting schedules
	Monitor online engagement and provide analytics reports
	Prepare presentations, reports, and briefing documents
	Liaise with internal and external stakeholders on behalf of the executive.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	Candidates should possess Project Management & Social Media Skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candiates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Manager, Finance",
  "description": "Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation etc . We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager, Finance

Job Location:&nbsp;Oshodi-Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are hiring a commercially sharp and strategic Manager, Finance to lead financial management, governance, and growth initiatives.
	This role will play a critical part in strengthening financial controls, improving profitability, supportinginvestor engagement, and expansion plans.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead financial strategy, budgeting, and long-range planning.
	Advise Management on financial performance and business risks, reminding.
	Manage cash flow, banking relationships, and working capital.
	Oversee accounting, audits, tax, and statutory compliance.
	Develop cost control measures across assembly and distribution.
	Build strong internal controls and reporting systems.
	Support pricing, margins, and business expansion models.
	Lead ERP and financial digital transformation initiatives.
	Driven debt/equity discussions, preparation of financial models, investor decks, due diligence, and lender/investor negotiations.
	Manage relationships with banks, investors, and financial institutions.


Qualifications and Experience


	Master&rsquo;s / Bachelor&rsquo;s in Accounting/Finance
	CA / CPA / ACCA or equivalent.
	8+years of finance leadership experience.
	Automotive /manufacturing /distribution exposure preferred.
	Strong commercial and strategic thinking ability.
	Proven experience dealing with lenders, investors, or fundraising environments.
	High integrity and leadership maturity
	Familiarity withAI-enabled financial planning, automation, analytics, and BI tools.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vacancies@danagroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  },

Manager, Finance Job at Dana Group




        
    

        
        Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation etc . We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager, Finance

Job Location: Oshodi-Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are hiring a commercially sharp and strategic Manager, Finance to lead financial management, governance, and growth initiatives.
	This role will play a critical part in strengthening financial controls, improving profitability, supportinginvestor engagement, and expansion plans.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead financial strategy, budgeting, and long-range planning.
	Advise Management on financial performance and business risks, reminding.
	Manage cash flow, banking relationships, and working capital.
	Oversee accounting, audits, tax, and statutory compliance.
	Develop cost control measures across assembly and distribution.
	Build strong internal controls and reporting systems.
	Support pricing, margins, and business expansion models.
	Lead ERP and financial digital transformation initiatives.
	Driven debt/equity discussions, preparation of financial models, investor decks, due diligence, and lender/investor negotiations.
	Manage relationships with banks, investors, and financial institutions.


Qualifications and Experience


	Master’s / Bachelor’s in Accounting/Finance
	CA / CPA / ACCA or equivalent.
	8+years of finance leadership experience.
	Automotive /manufacturing /distribution exposure preferred.
	Strong commercial and strategic thinking ability.
	Proven experience dealing with lenders, investors, or fundraising environments.
	High integrity and leadership maturity
	Familiarity withAI-enabled financial planning, automation, analytics, and BI tools.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
